findings.title: Possible hardcoded secret, token, or password

findings.title: SQL query appears to be built with string interpolation or concatenation
findings.evidence: query = "SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + user_id
findings.recommendation: Use parameterized queries or the database driver's bind parameter API.

findings.title: HTTP request is missing an explicit timeout
findings.recommendation: Pass a bounded timeout, for example timeout=10, to avoid hanging workers.

findings.title: File handle may not be closed on all paths
findings.recommendation: Use a context manager such as with open(...) as f to guarantee cleanup.

findings.title: Broad exception handler may hide failures
findings.recommendation: Catch the narrowest expected exception and log or re-raise unexpected failures.
